error_signature: Task request timed out after 60 seconds
title: Task request timeout in external mode
symptom: When using external mode for task runners, the Code nodes timeout after 60 seconds. The UI displays a message indicating that the task was not matched to a runner within the timeout period.
applies_when: Using external mode for task runners
not_this_if: Using internal mode for task runners
root_cause: The timeout occurs because the task runner is either down, not ready, or at capacity. This can happen if the task broker URI is incorrectly configured or if the runner is not properly connected to the broker.
fix_steps: Change the N8N_RUNNERS_TASK_BROKER_URI environment variable to 'http://localhost:5679'.
Ensure that the n8nio/runners:1.122.2 image is being used for the task runners.
Restart the n8n services to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the task broker URI and use the official n8nio/runners image.
